name: Partnership Marketing Plan
description: Partnership Marketing Plan - Marketing template for growth professionals
instructions: How to Use This Workbook Section Description Dashboard View key metrics and KPIs at a glance. Auto-calculated from data in other tabs. Partner Database Centralized list of all partners with contact info, type, industry, and status. Partnership Scorecard Track individual partner performance with revenue, leads, and engagement metrics. Campaign Tracker Monitor all partnership campaigns with budgets, spending, and ROI calculations. Revenue Sharing Manage deal structures and revenue splits with automated calculations.
